prompts.prompt: Build a shipping method selector with three options: Standard (free, 5-7 days), Express ($9.99, 2-3 days), and Overnight ($24.99, next day). Only one can be selected.
Build a checkout flow: cart summary → shipping → payment → confirmation
Like Notion's page header with icon picker and cover image
Build a file upload component that shows a progress bar during upload. Display the filename, file size, and percentage complete. Show a success state when done.
Create a user profile page with tabs for Overview, Activity, and Settings. Each tab should show different content. The Overview tab should be selected by default.
Navigation that collapses to hamburger on mobile
Build a quantity selector for a shopping cart item. It should have a number input with increment/decrement, min of 1, max of 99. Changing the quantity should call an update API endpoint.
Create an admin panel page layout with a fixed header, collapsible left sidebar, main content area, and a right panel for details. Wrap everything in the XDS theme.
Create a profile card with the user's name as a heading, their role as a label, their bio as body text, and their join date in small supporting text
Set up a dark mode toggle for my app. I want a button that switches between light and dark themes using the XDS theme system.
